accurate.why: Accurately describes the amendment, authorization amount, and effective dates.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; legislative history details are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as extending funding for Alzheimer's public health awareness.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the amendment to Section 398B(e) of the Public Health Service Act at 42 U.S.C. 280c-5(e).

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: States authorization covers FY2025-2029 and approval date December 11, 2024.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the single substantive change: $33M per year for five years.

concise.why: Includes unnecessary legislative history details (committee reports, Senate companion bill number, House/Senate passage dates) that add length without informational value for understanding the bill's effect.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Section 398B(e) of the Public Health Service Act and House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

correct_figures.why: $33M per year for FY2025-2029 accurately stated.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
